question: A man builds a house where all four walls face south. A bear walks past the house. What color is the bear?

collective.synthesizer_answer:
**Worker 25**

The answer is brown. This is because when exposed to sunlight, the south-facing walls absorb the most energy and reflect the most light. Hence, when a bear steps on top of such an object, it receives more heat from the sun which causes its body temperature to rise. The color of the bear would also depend on its diet, but in this case, it is brown because it has been exposed to sunlight.
